description_long: This house features a striking modern design with a boxy, geometric form and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by large, blue-tinted glass windows set within a mix of black, white, and brown exterior panels, creating a bold contrast. The front side showcases a prominent glass section spanning two stories, while the sides display a combination of solid and windowed surfaces, with one side almost entirely solid black. The rear view reveals a more segmented window arrangement, with horizontal and vertical divisions. The building appears to have three stories, each defined by strong horizontal lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall structure suggests a contemporary urban residence with a focus on natural light and clean lines.
description: A modern, three-story house with large blue-tinted windows, black and white paneling, and a flat roof, featuring bold geometric lines and a minimalist urban style.
description_view_0: The front view highlights expansive blue-tinted windows and a mix of black, white, and brown panels, with a clear emphasis on vertical and horizontal lines.
description_view_1: The left side is almost entirely solid black, with minimal window openings and a simple, monolithic appearance.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a more segmented window arrangement with horizontal and vertical divisions, and a continuation of the black and white color scheme.
description_view_3: The right side features a series of blue-tinted windows and black panels, with a stepped design and strong geometric shapes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass door, no visible porch, and a flush, clean-lined facade
